vulnerabilities.description: DevelopmentCookieSecurity sets Secure=false which could be misused in production if environment detection fails
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure production deployment always sets GO_ENV=production and validate AutoCookieSecurity logic prevents insecure cookies in production

vulnerabilities.description: SameSiteLaxMode may not provide sufficient CSRF protection for all endpoints
vulnerabilities.fix: Consider SameSiteStrictMode for state-changing operations or implement additional CSRF token validation

vulnerabilities.description: No explicit algorithm whitelisting visible in provided code
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure token validation explicitly rejects 'none' algorithm and only accepts expected signing methods

vulnerabilities.description: OAuth2 client credentials visible in test code could accidentally be committed with real credentials
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure test fixtures use mock/dummy credentials only

vulnerabilities.description: SAML response XML parsing without explicit XML entity expansion limits could allow XXE attacks
vulnerabilities.fix: Configure secure XML decoder with entity expansion limits

owasp_checks.detail: Argon2id used for passwords, SHA-256+ for SAML
No SQL injection patterns found in provided code
Proper security architecture with JWT, middleware separation
Proper JWT with expiration, secure password hashing

owasp_checks.category: A08:2021 – Software and Data Integrity Failures

owasp_checks.detail: No SSRF patterns found in provided code

critical_fixes: 3. Configure secure XML decoder for SAML to prevent XXE
4. Consider additional CSRF token validation for state-changing operations
